summary: Completed Module 2 BUILD step: configured process-level UTC time, converted database schema date columns to timestamptz(3), and implemented dynamic env-driven log level filtering in NestJS.
evidence: Prisma schema successfully migrated with explicit @db.Timestamptz(3) mapping for createdAt and clickedAt columns.
Database successfully reset and regenerated to apply timestamptz columns to PostgreSQL container.
NestJS application bootstrap modified in main.ts to freeze process timezone to UTC (process.env.TZ = 'UTC') at line one.
Implemented getLogLevels parser in main.ts to dynamically bind NestJS's default logger levels from process.env.LOG_LEVEL.
Successfully executed and passed the entire e2e test suite (test/app.e2e-spec.ts) following logger and timezone updates.
